description_long: This street food stall is a traditional pushcart with a weathered, sloped metal roof and a wooden frame painted in green and red hues. The cart features a large glass display case at the front, with signage in both Chinese characters and Latin script advertising 'LUMPIA CINA.' The side of the cart has a hinged door that opens outward, revealing cooking equipment such as pans and a flat griddle, as well as food items on display. A single large wheel supports one side of the cart, while wooden legs and handles extend from the other sides for mobility. A blue trash bin with visible refuse is placed next to the cart, enhancing its realism as a working street food vendor. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible wear and patina, suggesting frequent use in an urban street setting.
description: A weathered, traditional street food cart with a sloped metal roof, glass display case, colorful signage, and visible cooking equipment, accompanied by a trash bin.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass display case with 'LUMPIA CINA' signage and the main serving area.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the open door, interior cooking equipment, large wheel, and attached trash bin.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back panel, supporting legs, and the trash bin positioned beside the cart.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the main signage, glass case, and the full length of the cart's structure.
attribute_signage: Large glass panel at the front and side with red and white text 'LUMPIA CINA' and Chinese characters, painted directly on the glass and wood, with bold, blocky fonts.
attribute_serving_counter: A rectangular wooden counter beneath the glass display case, used for serving food, with a glass shield above and space for trays and utensils.
attribute_food_display: Food is displayed in a glass case at the front of the cart, visible and accessible to customers, with some items placed on trays and others in open containers.
attribute_architectural_style: traditional wooden cart with metal roof
